_comment: Promo code SALE15 — 15% off cart subtotal. Mockup intent-05-state-G-promo-applied.html line 159 'giảm 15% toàn giỏ' + line 303 'Mã SALE15 đã áp dụng'. Per D-S05-05 LAW (decisions-log line 216-250: LLM-Assisted Promo Code Typo Correction). Consumed by cart.apply_promo MCP tool (T02 territory) via case-insensitive exact match first; LLM typo fallback (cart_promo_typo.txt prompt) only if exact match fails.
label: Giảm 15% toàn giỏ

_comment: Promo code FREESHIP — cancel shipping fee. Even when subtotal < 100k threshold (per handoff §A1 free-ship rule), FREESHIP forces shipping=0. value=null because type='shipping' uses on/off semantics, not numeric discount.
label: Miễn phí vận chuyển

_comment: Promo code NEWUSER — 10.000₫ fixed off cart subtotal for new users. min_subtotal=0 (no minimum). Per handoff §6 line 282 fixture spec hint.
label: Giảm 10.000₫ cho khách mới
